name: Mistake gating leads to energy and memory efficient continual learning

description: arXiv:2604.14336v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Synaptic plasticity is metabolically expensive, yet animals continuously update their internal models without exhausting energy reserves. However, when artificial neural networks are trained, the network parameters are typically updated on every sample that is presented, even if the sample was classified correctly. author: Aaron Pache, Mark CW van Rossum
